summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues unabated. Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) and Ayar Labs (San Jose) each closed $500M rounds this month, while SiFive (Santa Clara) raised $400M for chip design and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) secured half a billion for AI-powered automation. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable, with seven companies actively hiring against a backdrop of relentless investor capital flowing into local startups.
